title: Purely Garlicky Tunisian Shrimp Pasta
description: A garlicky and juicy Tunisian dish featuring fettuccine, perfect for a date night, and is dairy-free friendly.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the fettuccine according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat and add the minced garlic, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the shrimp to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until pink and fully cooked.
Add the tunisian spice mix, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper to the skillet, stirring to combine.
Add the cooked fettuccine to the skillet, tossing to combine with the garlic shrimp mixture and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Using a spatula, gently lift and fold the fettuccine, allowing the sauce to mantecare and emulsify.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional lemon wedges if desired.
